user_query: I'm planning a surprise birthday party for my best friend and I need some inspiration for party games and decorations. Can you suggest some unique and fun ideas? I also want to gather reviews and ratings for local businesses in my area to find the best vendors for the party. Additionally, I would like to search for torrent files of popular party music to create a playlist.

TaskList.description: Search for unique and fun party games and decoration ideas.
Gather reviews and ratings for local businesses in the area to find the best vendors for the party.
Search for torrent files of popular party music to create a playlist.
